product_overview: Super Apps MATSANDATAMA is an integrated educational management system for MTsN 2 Kota Malang. It supports school administration through secure authentication, QR-based teacher attendance, student records, scheduling, grading, discipline tracking, and administrative controls.
core_goals: Modernize school administration with a centralized web platform
Provide secure, role-based access for all school stakeholders
Enable real-time QR-based teacher attendance validation
Support class, schedule, grading, and report card workflows
Deliver hierarchical time management across calendar year, academic year, and semester
Streamline discipline, verification, and admin operations with auditability

features.name: Authentication & Authorization
features.description: Provides secure login, token-based sessions, role switching, and impersonation for users with different access needs.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials and correct CAPTCHA -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/auth/me with token -> Receive current user profile and active role
POST /api/auth/login with invalid password 5 times -> Receive authentication failure responses -> Account is locked and subsequent POST /api/auth/login returns 403 or equivalent lockout error
POST /api/auth/switch-role with a valid JWT and permitted alternate role -> Receive 200 with updated active role -> GET /api/auth/me with token -> Receive profile showing switched role

POST /api/auth/impersonate with admin token and target user ID -> Receive 200 with impersonation JWT/session -> GET /api/auth/me with impersonated token -> Receive target user profile and original admin context preserved
POST /api/auth/logout with valid JWT -> Receive 200 logout confirmation -> GET /api/auth/me with same token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Journal/Attendance System (Jurnal Presisi)
features.description: Allows teachers to validate QR codes and create attendance journals using encrypted static or dynamic QR workflows with schedule and GPS checks.
user_flows: POST /api/journals/validate-qr with scanned encrypted QR payload, teacher context, and GPS coordinates -> Receive 200 with validation passed -> POST /api/journals/create with validation result and notes -> Receive 201 with created journal entry

POST /api/journals/validate-qr with expired dynamic QR or mismatched room metadata -> Receive 400/422 validation error -> POST /api/journals/create is not allowed or returns error due to failed validation
GET /api/journals/my with authenticated teacher token -> Receive 200 with the teacher's journal history and statuses
GET /api/journals/stats with authorized admin or leadership token -> Receive 200 with aggregated journal attendance statistics

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Manages full student records with EMIS-compliant fields, photo/document support, bulk import/export, and mutation or graduation tracking.
user_flows: GET /api/students with authorized staff token -> Receive 200 with paginated student list and search results -> POST /api/students with complete EMIS payload -> Receive 201 with created student record
PUT /api/students/{id} with valid updated demographic and family data -> Receive 200 with updated student profile -> GET /api/students with filters -> Receive updated record in results
POST /api/students/bulk-import with a valid Excel file -> Receive 200 with import summary and created/updated counts -> GET /api/students/export -> Receive 200 with downloadable Excel export
POST /api/students with missing required identifiers such as NISN or invalid EMIS fields -> Receive 422 validation error and no student record created

features.name: Schedule Management
features.description: Creates and maintains weekly teaching schedules, supports bulk import, and enables schedule validation for QR-based attendance.
user_flows: GET /api/schedules with authorized user token -> Receive 200 with schedule list -> POST /api/schedules with teacher, room, subject, day, and slot data -> Receive 201 with created schedule
GET /api/schedules/grid with semester context -> Receive 200 with weekly schedule grid visualization data
POST /api/schedules/bulk-import with a valid schedule spreadsheet -> Receive 200 with import summary and created schedules
POST /api/schedules/validate-qr with teacher, room, subject, and timestamp details -> Receive 200 if scheduled correctly -> Receive 400/403 if the teacher is not scheduled for that room/time

features.name: Class Management
features.description: Supports class creation, homeroom assignments, roster retrieval, and bulk attendance submission for class administration.
user_flows: GET /api/classes with authorized staff token -> Receive 200 with class list -> POST /api/classes with class name, grade, semester, and capacity -> Receive 201 with created class
GET /api/classes/{id}/students with class ID -> Receive 200 with the class student roster
POST /api/classes/bulk-attendance with class ID, attendance date, and student status entries -> Receive 200 with saved attendance summary
POST /api/classes with invalid or duplicate class code -> Receive 400/409 error and no class is created

features.name: Hierarchical Time Management
features.description: Manages the calendar year, academic year, and semester hierarchy and allows users to view or switch time context.
user_flows: GET /api/tahun-takwim with authenticated token -> Receive 200 with available calendar years
GET /api/academic/info with active context -> Receive 200 with the current academic year details
GET /api/semesters with academic year context -> Receive 200 with semester list for that year
GET /api/academic/info with an inactive or unauthorized context override -> Receive 403 or 422 error indicating the period is unavailable

features.name: Grading & Report Cards
features.description: Lets teachers enter grades, view their teaching classes, and retrieve student grade summaries for report generation.
user_flows: GET /api/grades/my-classes with teacher token -> Receive 200 with assigned classes and subjects -> POST /api/grades/input with student scores for a subject and semester -> Receive 201 with saved grade records
GET /api/grades/student/{id} with authorized token -> Receive 200 with student grade summary and calculated final scores
POST /api/grades/input with scores outside the valid numeric range or missing required fields -> Receive 422 validation error and no grades are stored

features.name: Discipline/Conduct Management (Tata Tertib)
features.description: Manages discipline categories, student infraction records, and handling actions such as counseling or parent notification.
user_flows: POST /api/tatib/kategori with admin or discipline staff token and category details -> Receive 201 with created discipline category -> GET /api/tatib/student/{id} with a student ID -> Receive 200 with conduct history and records
POST /api/tatib/penanganan with infraction ID, handling type, notes, and handler information -> Receive 201 with saved handling action
POST /api/tatib/kategori with duplicate code or invalid severity level -> Receive 409/422 error and no category is created

features.name: Data Verification (Verval)
features.description: Supports submission, review, approval, and rejection of verification requests for student or staff data.
user_flows: POST /api/verval/request with record details, supporting documents, and notes -> Receive 201 with pending verification request -> GET /api/verval/pending with reviewer token -> Receive 200 with pending request list -> PUT /api/verval/{id}/approve -> Receive 200 with approved status
POST /api/verval/request with missing documents or invalid payload -> Receive 422 error and request remains unsubmitted
PUT /api/verval/{id}/approve for a non-pending or unauthorized request -> Receive 403/409 error indicating approval is not allowed

features.name: Admin Features
features.description: Provides operational visibility and system controls including statistics, audit logs, backup, and settings management.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/stats with admin token -> Receive 200 with dashboard metrics for users, students, classes, journals, and verifications -> GET /api/admin/audit-logs -> Receive 200 with searchable audit trail entries
GET /api/settings with admin token -> Receive 200 with current configuration -> PUT /api/settings with updated school, session, GPS, or SMTP values -> Receive 200 with saved settings
POST /api/admin/backup with admin token -> Receive 200 with backup generation details and download reference
PUT /api/settings with invalid configuration values such as negative timeout or malformed SMTP settings -> Receive 422 validation error and settings are not saved

code_summary.description: Educational Management System for MTsN 2 Kota Malang - comprehensive school administration platform with QR-based attendance, student management, grading, and scheduling.

core_features.name: Authentication & Authorization
core_features.description: JWT-based auth with RBAC, multi-role support, admin impersonation, password policies, session management, math CAPTCHA

core_features.name: Journal/Attendance System (Jurnal Presisi)
core_features.description: Encrypted QR-based teacher attendance with real-time validation (schedule, GPS geofence, grace period)

core_features.name: Student Management
core_features.description: Comprehensive student data with EMIS compliance (150+ fields), mutations, graduation tracking
emis_fields: Family data (father, mother, guardian with extensive details)

core_features.name: Schedule Management
core_features.description: Teacher-to-room assignments, teaching slots (9 slots + breaks), multi-day weekly view

core_features.name: Class Management
core_features.description: Class organization, homeroom teacher assignment, student roster, bulk attendance

core_features.name: Hierarchical Time Management
core_features.description: 3-level hierarchy: Calendar Year → Academic Year → Semester with context switching

core_features.name: Grading & Report Cards
core_features.description: Grade input, report card generation, GPA calculation, PDF export

core_features.name: Discipline/Conduct Management (Tata Tertib)
core_features.description: Discipline categories, infraction recording, handling tracking, parent notification

core_features.name: Data Verification (Verval)
core_features.description: Student/teacher data verification workflow with approval/rejection

core_features.name: Admin Features
core_features.description: Settings management, user management, audit/security logging, backup/restore, statistics

database_models.name: users
database_models.description: User accounts with roles, EMIS data (if student), session management
key_fields: id, username, password_hash, full_name, email, phone

database_models.name: academic_years
database_models.key_fields: id, name, tahun_takwim_id, start_date, end_date, is_active

database_models.name: semesters
database_models.key_fields: id, name, code, academic_year_id, start_date, end_date, semester_type

database_models.name: classes
database_models.key_fields: id, name, code, grade, homeroom_teacher_id, semester_id, capacity

database_models.name: rooms
database_models.description: Classrooms with GPS coordinates for geofencing
database_models.key_fields: id, name, code, gps_lat, gps_lon, gps_radius_meters, gps_enabled, qr_secret

database_models.name: schedules
database_models.key_fields: id, semester_id, teacher_id, room_id, subject_id, day, slot_index, start_time, end_time

database_models.name: journals
database_models.description: Teacher attendance records with validation details
database_models.key_fields: id, teacher_id, room_id, subject_id, started_at, ended_at, validation (nested), status, notes

database_models.name: grades
database_models.key_fields: id, student_id, subject_id, semester_id, nilai_harian, nilai_uts, nilai_uas, nilai_akhir

database_models.name: attendance_records
database_models.key_fields: id, student_id, date, status (hadir/sakit/izin/alfa), note, submitted_by

database_models.name: audit_logs
database_models.description: Audit trail of all user actions
database_models.key_fields: id, user_id, action, entity, entity_id, details, ip_address, timestamp

database_models.name: security_logs
database_models.key_fields: id, event_type, username, ip_address, details, timestamp

database_models.name: settings
database_models.key_fields: school_name, logo_url, session_max_hours, idle_timeout_minutes, grace_minutes, gps settings, smtp settings

critical: Authentication flow (login, captcha, password policy, session timeout)
Journal/QR validation (encryption, schedule check, GPS, grace period)
high: Grade management and report card generation
Hierarchical time management (Year → Academic Year → Semester)

backend: Environment variables: MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, SECRET_KEY, CORS_ORIGINS

deployment_notes: Frontend: React app bundled with Craco, served via npm start (dev) or build (prod)
Backend: FastAPI with Uvicorn, async MongoDB via Motor
known_complexities: QR validation chain: decrypt → schedule check → GPS verify → grace period
EMIS data model: 150+ fields per student with complex nesting (parents, guardians, addresses)
Role switching: Users can have multiple roles and switch context
Hierarchical time: 3-level context (Calendar Year → Academic Year → Semester)
Journal locking: Time-based automatic status changes
Admin impersonation: Original admin preserved in JWT for reversion
test_data_requirements: Demo users with various roles (admin, guru, siswa, wali_kelas)
Teaching schedules with various time slots
